violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the bathroom. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Soap was provided at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024
The hand-washing sink in the bathroom was lacking paper towels. Paper towels were supplied at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2024

At the time of inspection, the exterior area behind the building was observed to have an accumulation of clothing and equipment items as well as overgrown vegetation. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, clutter, and litter, and maintained to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
